title: Player Magnetism Mod
description: Increase the radius of player magnetism to attract nearby drops.
body:
**Mod that increases player magnetism for nearby drops**

The standard game magnet radius is set to 1 block. This mod changes that to 4 blocks - thus attracting drops further away from the player.

It makes it much easier to farm wheat, seeds or sugar cane without running back and forth to collect everything. No longer do you have to run back for missed drops.

This simple mod only increases the players magnetism effect, pulling in-game drops towards the player in a larger area. It doesn't change any other game mechanics or adds new items.
